headline: DELL vs AAPL: Analysts See Upside for One, and Downside for the Other
summary: Dell (DELL) and Apple (AAPL) are both AI hardware stories, but they are very different stocks right now. Dell is the cleaner near-term AI infrastructure winner, especially after its latest earnings showed massive demand for AI servers and traditional servers. Meanwhile, Apple is the higher-quality consumer ecosystem bet, but its AI payoff is still less visible and depends more on future product execution.
